findings.title: Unauthenticated user profile access with sensitive data exposure
findings.description: User profile endpoint returns full user map including SSN and salary without requiring authentication

findings.title: Insecure direct object reference in project access
findings.description: Authenticated users can access any project by ID including budget details without ownership or role-based authorization

findings.title: Client-controlled role header for admin authorization
findings.description: Admin endpoint uses client-supplied X-User-Role header instead of server-side session role for authorization

findings.title: Missing authorization check on role update endpoint
findings.description: Any authenticated user can change any user's role including self-promotion to admin without authorization check

findings.title: Unauthenticated debug endpoint exposing secrets
findings.description: Debug config endpoint accessible without authentication returns database credentials, JWT secret, and API tokens
